name: HWR_SRVY_TOPICS
description:
This table will be used to store the topics that are keyed in by the line manager and will
be used by sentiment analysis job for the meeting survey. Table specific for meeting survey

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Topic Id identifying the Topic entry in this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the Topic being identified by Topic Id in this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the Topic being identified by Topic Id in this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_URI
columns.Comments: This is the URI of the Topic.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: TOPIC_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: TOPIC_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: TOPIC_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: TOPIC_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
